reviews.review_title: This Game is peaker than Gorilla Tag 2
reviews.review_description:
Bonobo VR is a hidden gem for those who love Gorilla Tag-style movement but want a more relaxed experience. Since the player base is smaller, it’s the perfect place to explore at your own pace, practice your movement, or just enjoy the quiet without chaotic lobbies.

The lack of updates might seem like a downside to some, but honestly, it’s refreshing! You don’t have to constantly relearn mechanics or adjust to changes—what you see is what you get, and it works well. If you’re looking for a simple, fun, and nostalgic VR experience without the pressure of competition, Bonobo VR is worth checking out!
All models are either stolen from sketchfab, or followed some trash tutorial. I would never play this game again if I got 1,000,000 dollars.

developer_response.body: Maybe check your facts before you assume things. The game has no sketchfab models. If it did I would say so in the credits.
